message:
data(audit): record 35-file fresh-eyes audit across sync, combinator, database, HTTP, and messaging modules

All SOUND except 2 bugs fixed in prior commit (mpsc lost wakeup,
mysql connection pool leak). Audit batch piwhi5 by SapphireHill.
